title: Implement One Release Truth
rawUserRequest: 按项目校准与更新重新校准执行计划，完成工单 1：One Release Truth；统一 release-state.json、release.json、next-release.json 的事实边界，并为状态、版本和证据引用建立可验证的一致性门。
outOfScope: Candidate sourceCommit 生命周期及合并后重新计算（工单 2）
Provider Asset 真实 Digest 生成与发布绑定（工单 3）
release.json 的公开安装契约字段和历史发布资产

sources.reason: 工单 1 的目标、边界和验收要求。
当前 canonical 状态记录及其字段。
当前未发布 Candidate 投影。
现有状态一致性检查实现。

riskAssessment.reason: 发布元数据被安装器、发布检查和文档共同消费；本工单只固化 canonical state 与 projection 边界，不改变发布生命周期或公开安装契约。

executionDecision.reason: 用户已授权按计划串行执行；本工单实现和验证范围已明确。

preReviewWarnings: Review that release-state.json is the only canonical state/transition record and that legacy metadata remains projection-only.
Review that malformed, conflicting, placeholder, or duplicate release metadata fails closed without changing release assets.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release-state.json declares the canonical release state machine and explicitly identifies release.json and next-release.json as projection metadata, while preserving backward-compatible legacy fields.

The consistency checker enforces one published tag, one candidate tag, previousRelease alignment, valid state/evidence combinations, exact legacy projection digests, and fail-closed behavior for conflicts or placeholder values.
Focused tests cover every supported state, malformed metadata, mismatched tags, digest drift, duplicate published/candidate tags, and projection-only semantics.
English and Japanese distribution documentation describe the canonical/projection boundary and do not claim candidate metadata is public release truth.

declaredIntent.summary: Make release-state.json the canonical release state record and validate release.json/next-release.json as projection metadata.

guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: 评审发现 release-state.json、release.json 和 next-release.json 同时表达发布事实，容易在 Candidate、published tag、source commit 和证据状态之间产生冲突。工单 1 需要先固定唯一状态事实源，供后续 sourceCommit 生命周期和真实 evidence digest 工单消费。
constraints: 只处理状态/版本/投影一致性；不提前实现工单 2 的 Candidate sourceCommit 生命周期或工单 3 的 Provider Asset digest。
保留 release.json 的公开安装契约和历史发布兼容性。
所有冲突和无效证据必须 fail closed；不能把用户授权或文档描述当作发布证据。
intent.rationale: 先建立 canonical state 与 projection 的明确边界，才能让后续 candidate 生命周期、真实 digest 和 release workflow 改动共享同一可验证协议。

evidence: checker tests state/evidence pairing and absent candidate compatibility

scenarioCoverage.scenario: candidate_verified or release_published with real digest
evidence: checker rejects null and placeholder digests

scenarioCoverage.scenario: published/candidate tag or projection digest conflict

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: 用户已明确授权按执行计划修改实现、测试、治理配置和文档，并为每个工单创建独立 PR。

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
